prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "BOSU 单腿站立" (BOSU single-leg balance) exercise, front view, facing the viewer. Person posture: Athletic person standing on a BOSU half-ball training device with the dome side facing UP (the flat platform is on the floor, the rubber dome is what the foot stands on). Only the RIGHT FOOT is balanced on the center of the dome. The LEFT LEG is lifted off the ground with the left knee bent to 90 degrees in front of the body (left thigh approximately parallel to the floor). Both arms are extended out to the sides at shoulder height for balance. Right knee is slightly bent for shock absorption. Torso upright with neutral spine. Plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top.. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: ankle stabilizers of the supporting leg (peroneals, tibialis posterior, intrinsic foot muscles). Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: quadriceps and gluteus medius of the supporting leg, and core stabilizers. Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "踝稳定肌" pointing to the ankle stabilizers; "臀中肌 / 股四头肌" pointing to the gluteus medius and quadriceps; "核心肌群" pointing to the core stabilizers. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
